citations.narrative:
The licensee was not able to provide records with the acquisition and disposition information for several of the animals.
There were no disposition records for two llamas and one cow or acquisition records for the three alpacas. Additionally,
there were six lambs and seven goat kids born on the premise which did not have records of their birth dates.
Failure to maintain records for animal acquisitions and dispositions can make it difficult to track animal movement and
make it hard to identify trends in animal losses, which could indicate disease conditions.
Every exhibitor shall make, keep, and maintain records or forms which fully disclose the information concerning animals,
purchased or otherwise acquired, owned, held, leased, or otherwise in his or her possession or under his or her control, or
which is transported, sold, euthanized, or otherwise disposed of by that exhibitor.
Correct by: May 21, 2026 .
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the licensee.
n

narrative:
2.75(b)(1) 
   
Records: Dealers and exhibitors. 
The licensee was not able to provide records with the acquisition and disposition information for several of the animals. 
There were no disposition records for two llamas and one cow or acquisition records for the three alpacas. Additionally, 
there were six lambs and seven goat kids born on the premise which did not have records of their birth dates.  
Failure to maintain records for animal acquisitions and dispositions can make it difficult to track animal movement and 
make it hard to identify trends in animal losses, which could indicate disease conditions. 
Every exhibitor shall make, keep, and maintain records or forms which fully disclose the information concerning animals, 
purchased or otherwise acquired, owned, held, leased, or otherwise in his or her possession or under his or her control, or 
which is transported, sold, euthanized, or otherwise disposed of by that exhibitor. 
Correct by: May 21, 2026 . 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the licensee.
